description: Official iOS product page for Tiimo, a visual planner app designed to help neurodivergent people organize tasks, manage time, and support communication routines.
title: Tiimo App Store Page (iOS)

description: Open-source repository for Goblin Tools, providing access to the underlying code for tools like Magic To Do and Formalizer used to refine and simplify neurodivergent communication.
title: Goblin Tools GitHub Repository

description: Official Headspace app with guided meditations, breathing techniques, and mindful exercises specifically curated for calming the mind. Supports iOS and Android platforms.
title: Headspace: Meditation & Sleep

description: AI-enhanced browser-based tool with text-to-speech, word prediction, and dictionary features tailored for neurodiversity, supporting dyslexic and autistic users in reading and writing.
title: Read&Write by Texthelp - AI Communication Aid

description: AI-based software designed specifically for dyslexia, offering context-sensitive spelling, grammar, and word prediction to improve written communication for neurodivergent users.
title: Ghotit Real Writer - Dyslexia Writing Support

description: Motion AI automatically plans your work and adds tasks to your calendar based on rules you determine, reducing executive function strain for neurodivergent users.
title: Motion AI - Neurodivergent-Friendly Task Planning Tool

description: Detailed guide on body doubling as a specific tool for neurodivergent task initiation, explaining how to find thought partners.
title: The OT Toolbox - Body Doubling Guide

description: Official Apple App Store page for Tiimo, enabling neurodivergent users to download the app for sensory regulation through visual timelines and AI planning features.
title: Tiimo App Store  iOS & Android Download
